idea.title: Tier-1 Repaint
idea.hook: Your CIS-flavored hypercasual is stuck at 0.4% CTR — swap title words, screenshot motifs, and hook copy to hit Tier-1 thresholds across three markets simultaneously.
idea.hook_ru: Твой казуал застрял на 0.4% CTR — меняй слова в названии, мотивы скринов и хук-копи, чтобы пробить Тир-1 сразу в трёх рынках.
idea.prototype: Mock app-store card with 4 slots × 4 chip variants and 3 market panels (US/JP/BR). Each market scores CTR from a hidden taste vector; budget of 10 chip swaps; goal is to push all three markets ≥ 0.8% CTR on the same loadout.
idea.why_novel: 3-market simultaneous CTR optimization with shared loadout — the constraint is simultaneity, not per-market tuning
idea.non_timer_pressure: Swap budget (10 chip swaps across 3 markets)
idea.lose_condition: 10 swaps spent and at least one market still below 0.8% CTR

sources.title: Tier-1 thinking signals
sources.snippet: Tier-1 thinking should influence prototypes early

synthesizer_brief: CTR optimization meta-game targeting the cover-art layer
